Error.description: Error is returned when a handler encounters an error. It contains a simple error message that the developer can customize.

message.description: Error message (e.g., 'user not found', 'database connection failed')

FieldViolation.description: FieldViolation describes a single validation error for a specific field.

description.description: Human-readable description of the validation violation (e.g., 'must be a valid email address', 'required field missing')

field.description: The field path that failed validation (e.g., 'user.email' for nested fields). For header validation, this will be the header name (e.g., 'X-API-Key')

GeoCoordinates.description: GeoCoordinates represents a geographic location using WGS84 coordinates.

maxItems.description: Maximum items to return (1-25). Zero uses the service default.

ListRadiationObservationsResponse.description: ListRadiationObservationsResponse contains normalized readings plus coverage metadata.

conflictingCount.description: Observations where contributing sources materially disagree.

convertedFromCpmCount.description: Observations whose normalized value was derived from CPM.

corroboratedCount.description: Observations corroborated by more than one source.

epaCount.description: Number of EPA RadNet observations included.

fetchedAt.description: Time the service synthesized the response, as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

lowConfidenceCount.description: Observations that remain low-confidence after synthesis.

RadiationObservation.description: RadiationObservation represents a normalized ambient dose-rate reading.

baselineValue.description: Rolling baseline for this station in nSv/h.

confidence.description: RadiationConfidence represents how strongly the reading is supported.

items.description: RadiationSource identifies the upstream measurement network.

convertedFromCpm.description: True when the value was converted from CPM using a generic fallback.

corroborated.description: Whether a second source corroborated the observed pattern.

delta.description: Current reading minus rolling baseline in nSv/h.

observedAt.description: Time the observation was recorded, as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

severity.description: RadiationSeverity classifies whether a reading is behaving normally.

source.description: RadiationSource identifies the upstream measurement network.

unit.description: Display unit, currently always nSv/h after normalization.

value.description: Dose equivalent rate normalized to nSv/h.

zScore.description: Standard deviation distance from the rolling baseline.

ValidationError.description: ValidationError is returned when request validation fails. It contains a list of field violations describing what went wrong.

get.description: ListRadiationObservations retrieves normalized EPA RadNet and Safecast readings.

parameters.description: Maximum items to return (1-25). Zero uses the service default.
parameters.name: max_items
